text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup is here at last. Gold City turns to
me asking why I was so persistent in making sure
she kept running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her it was because I understood she wanted
to run. She laughs at me, astonished.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her it was because I understood she wanted
to run. She laughs at me, astonished.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City tells me that she's glad to have chosen
me as her trainer. Promising that she'll run like
herself, she heads off to today's race of
champions!
